name: flow-team-skill
description: Agent skill package for the Flow (flow.team) Open API — read, act, and proactively suggest across projects, tasks, calendar, members, search, and alarms.
author: Mrbaeksang

scripts.check: for f in setup.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/flow.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/brief.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/report.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/profile.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/recommend.mjs skills/flow-team/scripts/schedule-setup.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done
